name: shalvinat-hms
description: Shalvinat Healthcare Limited Hospital Management System

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix apps/api install && npm --prefix apps/web install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix apps/api run dev" "npm --prefix apps/web start"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/api run lint && npm --prefix apps/web run lint
